cast.name: 阿兰·普罗斯特 Alain Prost

director.name: 特里斯坦·塞盖拉 Tristan Séguéla

introduction: Even those who are not fans of car racing know his name. However, only a few people know what this world champion, nicknamed "the professor" due to his intellectual approach to racing, is really like. We will get to know a man characterized by insight, talent, and incredible willpower. For many years, he risked his life every weekend on the race track in cars traveling at speeds of over 300 km/h. Alain Prost will share many aspects of his life with the audience. He will talk about his racing career, his love of cycling, and his experiences in the business world as a CEO.
